title: Login — EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: inline error shown, Resend button visible, tap Resend → success message

preconditions.description: Expo web app is running and reachable at the configured base URL.
Backend is running. POST /auth/login returns EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED for unverified accounts. POST /auth/resend-verification sends a new email.
An account with email DATA-1 exists but has NOT been email-verified. Created via API signup without going through email verification.

testData.name: unverifiedEmail
testData.description: Email of an account that was signed up but never verified.

journey.description: Enter correct password (the block is email verification, not password).
Confirm the resend link is now visible.
Tap the Resend Verification Email button.

target.text: Please verify your email before logging in.

assertions.description: InlineError renders the EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED error message.
Resend button appears when unverifiedEmail state is set.
Resend verification API call is made when the button is tapped.

target.text: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

assertions.description: resendSuccess state renders the green success message.

manualValidationRequired.reason: No supported native automation runner is currently configured.
No supported native automation runner is currently configured.

notes: The 'Resend Verification Email' element is a <Pressable> with a <Text> child — not a <button> element in the DOM. Target by text content.
The resend success text 'Verification email sent. Check your inbox.' is rendered in green via inline style (not InlineError component).
The unverifiedEmail state is set to the trimmed email from the login form, which is passed directly to resendVerification() on tap.
